summary: C5 Integration complete. Worker accepts gradientStops, shapeConfig, distortionLUT in TileTask — handles mask mode (skip outside pixels), distortion mode (warp coords via LUT), and custom gradient mapping. FractalEngine stores all new state with setGradient/setShapeConfig methods, precomputes LUT as number[] for structured-clone transfer. ControlsPanel has shape dropdown (none+3 shapes+6 chess), mode toggle, aspect/roundness sliders (hidden for chess), gradient editor mount, collapsible sections. L-System mask via pixel compositing, distortion disabled for L-Systems. Bundle 476KB (122KB gzip).
